_source: IHKE3306S02 (處方藥品 detail) — synthetic, fields per adapter shape
_note: Drug + parent visit context as passed to adaptMedicationFromDetail(drug, visit). v0.8.0: shape mirrors NHI's real bilingual convention `中文||English` for drug_name, act, and icd9cm_CODE_CNAME. drug_name2 / icd9cm_CODE_CNAME2 are NHI's own Chinese-only convenience fields.
